content.scenarioHint: 你刚收到老板确认请假获批的邮件，现在当面或通过即时消息向他/她礼貌确认并表达感谢，准备结束对话。
expectedAnswers: Just to confirm, my leave is officially approved, right? Thanks so much!
Great, thanks for approving my request—I really appreciate it. I’ll catch up when I’m back.
So everything’s set for my time off? Thanks for your support!
Awesome, I’m all set then. Thank you for helping me out—I’ll be back next Monday!
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：是否明确确认了请假已获批并表达了感谢
语言准确性：语法正确，时态和用词恰当
表达自然度：符合职场英语口语习惯，语气礼貌得体
关键词覆盖：使用了 'approved', 'thanks', 'appreciate', 'set' 等场景关键词

content.speakerText: I'm heading out for my long weekend. Just wanted to make sure you're all good with my schedule.
content.speakerTextCn: 我要去度长周末了，只是想确认你对我的排班没有问题。
expectedAnswers: All good! Have a relaxing break and see you Monday.
Confirmed! Don't stress about work — enjoy your time off.
Perfect! We've got everything covered while you're away.
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：清晰确认排班无问题，消除对方顾虑
语言准确性：语法正确，用词恰当
表达自然度：语气轻松、积极，符合轻松道别语境
关键词覆盖：包含 confirmed/all good/see you/relaxing 等关键词
